title: Wisconsin DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Wisconsin DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (WI DHS Disability Determination Bureau), official class codes and DPM class-spec URLs (Disability Determination Specialist = 49201, Disability Determination Supervisor = 49220, Program Manager = 49240), the 2025-27 Compensation Plan with pay-progression differentials and GWAs (3.0% 2025, 2.0% 2026), a ZipRecruiter market estimate (~$60,202; $48,400–$65,600), non-represented post-Act-10 status, and why the encoded Comp Plan PDFs could not be extracted. Companion to WI/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Wisconsin Division of Personnel Management (DPM); WI DHS Disability Determination Bureau
source.title: WI DDS salary research notes (DPM class specs 49201/49220/49240 + 2025-27 Comp Plan; ZipRecruiter estimate)

notes: Computed: class codes (49201/49220/49240) and DPM class-spec URLs are confirmed, but the code-to-pay-range crosswalk could not be read — the DPM Comp Plan and class-spec PDFs are digitally encoded/compressed and text extraction failed, so the only quantitative figure is a ZipRecruiter market estimate (~$60,202; $48,400–$65,600). Non-represented post-Wisconsin Act 10 (2011); pay set legislatively with $1.00 service-anniversary differentials at 5/7/10 yrs.
